requirement.original: 将这个结尾工作流也加入到clean的适配。同时告诉我还有哪些command 也需要加收尾工作流的适配
requirement.clarified: The ending-workflow adaptation in clean.md must direct users to a path that actually works under current contract mechanics. Fix agents/cleaner.md to write the push-gate token after its inline commit; then change commands/clean.md:589 to simply say 'run /push'.
requirement.what: Add push-gate token write to agents/cleaner.md after cleanup commit; simplify commands/clean.md:589 to 'run /push'
requirement.why: Cycle 1 added '/commit then /push' to clean.md:589 but this chain is broken: cleaner commits inline without writing a push-gate token; changelog-analyst exits 'Nothing to commit' when repo is clean; push-gate token is never written; /push rejects on missing token. Close-report 20260517-172600.md confirmed CLOSE: NO.

included: agents/cleaner.md — add push-gate token write after inline cleanup commit
excluded: Codex findings F4/F5/F6 from close-report (out of scope)

success_criteria: After /clean completes, user can run /push without missing-token rejection
commands/clean.md:589 reads 'run /push' with no mention of /commit
agents/cleaner.md writes push-gate token JSON at canonical path after cleanup commit
constraints: Push-gate token write must guard against session_id collision (matching changelog-analyst Phase 10 behavior)
Token write must be conditional on git commit exit code 0
Do not re-introduce bash invocations to clean.md
Do not expand scope to other command files

path_dependent_shared_infra: agents/changelog-analyst.md (read-only reference for token-write algorithm — tier_2_verified)

root_cause_analysis.symptom: User following commands/clean.md:589 runs '/commit then /push' and hits a hard failure: either 'No task-id provided' or changelog-analyst exits 'Nothing to commit after exclusions' without writing the push-gate token, causing /push to reject with token-absent error
root_cause_analysis.root_cause: agents/cleaner.md's inline git commit (Section 5 'Git Operations') does not write the push-gate token after committing. When /commit is run afterwards, changelog-analyst finds nothing to commit (repo already clean) and exits before Phase 10. The push-gate token is never written.
root_cause_analysis.root_cause_commit: c7f7afc docs(dev): add close-report and update cleanliness inspector report for redev-20260517-155838 (Cycle 1 change to clean.md:589)
root_cause_analysis.why_introduced: Cycle 1 added ending-workflow guidance to clean.md:589 but addressed only the documentation layer without fixing the upstream token-write gap in agents/cleaner.md
root_cause_analysis.why_problematic: The /commit → changelog-analyst → Phase 10 chain requires something to commit. After /clean, the repo is already clean. changelog-analyst:451 exits 'Nothing to commit after exclusions' before reaching Phase 10 (push-gate write). The workaround suggested in the documentation cannot succeed.
root_cause_analysis.timeline: 2026-05-17: Cycle 1 committed clean.md:589 change. Close-report same day: CLOSE: NO. Cycle 2 now.
observations: agents/cleaner.md Section 5 lines 95-105: plain git commit, no push-gate token write (inferred: Read tool)
agents/changelog-analyst.md:451: 'Nothing to commit after exclusions' exit 0 — Phase 10 never runs when no files remain (inferred: Read tool)
commands/push.md:53-59: push-gate token required; token_path = /tmp/agentic-commit/push/<repo-hash>/<branch-encoded>.json; rejection if absent (inferred: Read tool)
commands/clean.md:589: broken text confirmed via Read tool
root_cause_analysis.diagnosis_completeness: incomplete (inferred only — no live runtime observation of the failure, but chain is deterministic and confirmed by Codex in close-report)
root_cause_analysis.localization_evidence: Codex adversarial review in close-report-20260517-172600.md traced exact failure path through commit.md:39, changelog-analyst.md:451, push.md:63-66. Root-cause file identified as agents/cleaner.md (missing push-gate token write after inline commit).
root_cause_analysis.located_source: agents/cleaner.md Section 5 'Git Operations' — inline commit with no push-gate token write following it

evidence.gap: agents/cleaner.md omits the push-gate token write that makes /push usable; clean.md:589 references a broken command chain

attempts.outcome: CLOSE: NO — '/commit then /push' chain fails after /clean: bare /commit requires task-id (commit.md:39); /commit --force dispatches changelog-analyst which finds clean repo and exits 'Nothing to commit' (line 451) without reaching Phase 10; push-gate token never written; /push rejects with token-absent error

novelty_check.rationale: Cycle 1 patched the documentation (L1) without fixing the upstream data gap (L3: missing push-gate token write in agents/cleaner.md). Cycle 2 adds the token write at the source, making /push executable.
